---
name: Bug Report
about: Something in inji doesn't work as documented
title: "fix: "
labels: "bug"
assignees: ""
---

## Before Opening This Issue

- [ ] I checked [existing issues](https://github.com/shalomb/inji/issues) for duplicates
- [ ] I can reproduce the bug with the latest release (`pip install --upgrade inji`)
- [ ] I checked the [README](https://github.com/shalomb/inji#readme) and examples

---

## What doesn't work? *(required)*

> Be specific — describe exactly what doesn't work as documented.

## How to reproduce *(required)*

> Minimal reproduction — a template + command that shows the bug.

```bash
# template content
$ echo '...' > template.j2

# command
$ inji template.j2 -k foo=bar

# output / error
```

## Versions *(required)*

- **inji version**: `inji --version`
- **Python version**: `python3 --version`
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- **Install method**: [pip / uvx / pipx]

## Expected behaviour *(required)*

## Actual behaviour *(required)*

## Error message

```
paste exact error here
```

## Fix Acceptance Criteria *(required)*

> How will we know this is fixed? Specific, testable checks.

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Additional context

> Logs, screenshots, related issues — anything else useful.
